name: Takedown Request #1834
message: [Redacted] specializes in filter andconveyor technology, offering a wide range of products includingvarious types of conveyors, filtration systems, and central supply and disposal systems.We are ready to upload 32gb of corporate data. Personal information of employees (passports and ID scans), agreements and contracts, projects, client information, drawings and specification of BMW subsidiary in Thailand and other files.
